panel_eval_trend_old_panel.note: Old panel (v55/v54/v44/v45/v14) saturated at 0.878 WR (v157_sc). Trend: v148=0.698→v157=0.878. Panel was too easy — old-engine models play suboptimally in new engine.

panel_eval_trend_new_panel.note: New panel: v67_sc(2017), v136_sc(2022), v77_sc(2092), v78_sc(2097), v132_sc(2092). Expected WR at ~1800 ELO: 18-25%. Effective v159_sc+.

context: Three root cause fixes (panel formula + fixture balance + LR=5e-5) drove panel WR 0.698→0.878 in 10 runs. But panel saturated because old-engine opponents (v44/v45/v55 nominal ELO 2042-2096) play poorly in the new engine. New sc-lineage panel will give honest discrimination. Model is genuinely strong — beating old frontier models 87% of the time.
